config.neo4j.topic.cypher.ctsserver.CTS_DataCen: call apoc.do.case([ event.op = 'c','MERGE (c:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.after.CTSCustID}) MERGE (d:Device {DeviceId: event.after.DCSDeviceID}) MERGE (c)-[r:USED_DEVICE {CTSAssDevID: event.after.CTSAssDevID}]->(d) ON CREATE SET r.SubscriberID = event.after.SubscriberID, r.CreatedTime = event.after.CreatedTime, r.InsertTime = event.after.InsertTime SET c:CookFAD' ,event.op = 'u','MATCH (:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.CTSCustID})-[ro:USED_DEVICE]->(:Device {DeviceId: event.before.DCSDeviceID}) DELETE ro WITH event MERGE (c:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.after.CTSCustID}) MERGE (d:Device {DeviceId: event.after.DCSDeviceID}) MERGE (c)-[r:USED_DEVICE {CTSAssDevID: event.after.CTSAssDevID}]->(d) ON CREATE SET r.SubscriberID = event.after.SubscriberID, r.CreatedTime = event.after.CreatedTime, r.InsertTime = event.after.InsertTime SET c:CookFAD' ,event.op = 'd','MATCH (c:CTSCustomer {CTSCustID: event.before.CTSCustID})-[r:USED_DEVICE]->(d:Device {DeviceId: event.before.DCSDeviceID}) DELETE r'],'',{event:event}) yield value return value
